name: libdevel-overloadinfo-perl
title: libdevel-overloadinfo-perl
description:
module to introspect overloaded operators
Devel::OverloadInfo returns information about overloaded operators for a
given class (or object), including where in the inheritance hierarchy the
overloads are declared and where the code implementing it is.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdevel-overloadinfo-perl because module to introspect overloaded operators.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdevel-overloadinfo-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdevel-overloadinfo-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdevel-overloadinfo-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
